programme.title: Movie: Royally Ever After

programme.title: Movie: Love in Paradise

programme.title: The Office

programme.desc: When Michael visits Dunder Mifflin corporate headquarters in New York on Valentine's Day, both he and Jan are in for a surprise. Meanwhile back in Scranton, the office staff celebrates Valentine's Day grade school style.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Shockwave
programme.desc: A murder investigation turns explosive while Captain Sharon Raydor duels with Chief Winnie Davis for control of her case as she and her squad try to determine if they are dealing with a terrorist.

programme.desc: After discovering the identity of the bomber her division has been searching for, Sharon Raydor and the Major Crimes squad struggle to determine his next target.

programme.desc: A rare genetic disease causes fatal insomnia.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: BattleBots: Like a Bot to a Flame
programme.desc: As the Top 16 looms closer, a group of underdogs gives it their last shot, and in the Main Event, Rotator and undefeated Death Roll bring everything they have to the BattleBox.

programme.title: BattleBots: Now or Never
programme.desc: Tonight every fight has Championship consequences. In the Main Event, Copperhead and Black Dragon battle for high seedings, and all the rest are fighting for survival. A win means life and a loss and it's time to power down for good.

programme.title: BattleBots: Now or Never
programme.desc: Copperhead and Black Dragon battle it out for high seedings in the Main Event. A win means life but anything else means total power loss.

programme.title: BattleBots: Qualify Or Die!
programme.desc: The World Championship qualifiers reach their climax, with Hydra facing Uppercut and Whiplash against Valkyrie in two ferocious final battles. Only then can the top 32 finalists finally be revealed.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Family Affair
programme.desc: The stakes get higher when teams on the brink start to feel the heat, and as the clash continues, undefeated bots Son of Whyachi and the Ewerts look to continue their reign of terror.

programme.title: BattleBots: Qualify Or Die!
programme.desc: The World Championship qualifiers reach their climax, with Hydra facing Uppercut and Whiplash against Valkyrie in two ferocious final battles. Only then can the top 32 finalists finally be revealed.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Family Affair
programme.desc: The stakes get higher when teams on the brink start to feel the heat, and as the clash continues, undefeated bots Son of Whyachi and the Ewerts look to continue their reign of terror.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: A life-threatening cold front approaches the mountain and the family prioritizes shelters for their livestock. The task is easier said than done, as it will require the siblings to make a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Water to Ice
programme.desc: A deep freeze halts the water supply, sending the ranch into a new crisis. And with a critical load of lumber delivered to the base of their mountain, the Wolfpack must problem solve to get their house back on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Land Giveths and Takeths
programme.desc: As winter winds down, the Browns prepare for a medieval-themed birthday celebration for Baby Eli. Pushing through the pandemic, the Browns complete the main house just before a massive wildfire strikes the mountain.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Honey Pot
programme.desc: Hunting for a huge payday in Tyler's hometown of Sandstone, the team encounters a dangerous new method for extracting gold and Parker must decide if the risk is worth the reward.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine, Moment, Machine
programme.desc: Parker makes a gamble on dry-mining equipment to test the gold-rich ground of Western Australia. A case of gold fever proves costly, and Parker nearly loses a team member.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hard Rock Risks
programme.desc: Tyler leads Parker to a promising hard rock mine where they detonate high explosives to gauge if the rewards of underground mining justify the risks.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Future Ground
programme.desc: Parker travels deep into the 'Super Pit' gold mine, stakes a new claim, and makes a big decision that could change his mining career. To jump start his season, Rick Ness reunites his crew for a high-octane 500-mile ice race that ends with a big surprise.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Love in the Time of Corona
programme.desc: To keep boredom at bay during the summer quarantine, the kids rope Trent and Amber into viral video challenges. It's great family fun, but the cabin fever is putting a cramp in Trent and Amber's bedroom life, so they decide to try a pole dancing class.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What's Cooking, Good Looking?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber meet with an intimacy coach to spice things up, and a cooking competition inspires Alex to improve his culinary skills. Jonah's girlfriend Ashley visits from Asheville, and Anna teaches new tricks to her main man -- the family dog Cruiser.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Did Somebody Shrink You?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber surprise Emma and Alex with a go kart so that they can practice driving. Meanwhile, Elizabeth is making big strides in her nursing career, but she is not happy to see her younger siblings behind the wheel before she has her own license.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Gay and Religious
programme.desc: The sister wives visit Mariah and her fiancée, Audrey, in Chicago. Meri opens up about how badly she behaved when Mariah first came out as gay and Mariah confesses about her struggles growing up gay in their polygamist church.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn vs. Kody
programme.desc: Robyn's rental house has been sold out from under her and she has only 28 days to find a new home. There are no rentals and tensions run high as Kody insists they buy. Not wanting to slow down building homes on Coyote Pass, Robyn refuses. It's an impasse.

programme.title: Sister Wives: The Heat is On
programme.desc: A forest fire is bearing down on Meri's house and she's freaking out. Meri prepares to evacuate. Robyn is just days away from losing her rental and tensions are high with Kody. Lastly, Madison is having contractions and thinks the baby is coming tonight!

programme.title: Sister Wives: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Maddie thinks she's in labour, but it's a false alarm, so Kody heads back to Flagstaff. Kody and Robyn are at wits' end over their struggle to close on her house. Then, Kody and Meri head to their therapist in Vegas, where the brutal truth comes out.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Two Moms, Their Daughter, and a Baby
programme.desc: Kody and Robyn are struggling with the bank as the mortgage process is not designed for plural marriage. Then in North Carolina, Maddie's water breaks, at the mall. Evie K is born, but when she has problems breathing, an ambulance is called.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn vs. Kody
programme.desc: Robyn's rental house has been sold out from under her and she has only 28 days to find a new home. There are no rentals and tensions run high as Kody insists they buy. Not wanting to slow down building homes on Coyote Pass, Robyn refuses. It's an impasse.

programme.title: Sister Wives: The Heat is On
programme.desc: A forest fire is bearing down on Meri's house and she's freaking out. Meri prepares to evacuate. Robyn is just days away from losing her rental and tensions are high with Kody. Lastly, Madison is having contractions and thinks the baby is coming tonight!

programme.title: Sister Wives: Baby Steps

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Missing in Action

programme.title: I Am Jazz: I Want to Meet Your (Transphobic) Mom

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Our Home Is Sick

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Quints Get Schooled

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Was Expecting

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father of the Bride

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Had in Mind
programme.desc: LaQuet is looking for a fun gown with straps. Kat wants a one-of-a-kind dress with no sweetheart neckline, but the consultants put her in one anyway. Valerie wants a mermaid silhouette until she realizes they may not be for her.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Baby Steps

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: Across Texas, boating and fishing patrols are interrupted by record storms and flooding. Near Austin, Search and Rescue teams save multiple people from dangerous swift water and tornadoes. Wardens chase a felon with an illegal gun in East Texas.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gulf Recon
programme.desc: A specialty team of Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug smuggling operations across the border. The K-9 unit is called in to investigate a woman who may be killing owls to sell exotic headdresses.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: To Catch a Poacher
programme.desc: A team of Wardens deploy on a multi-county night operation to stop spotlighters and road hunters. Texas Game Wardens check teal hunters on opening weekend. A dead deer found with an arrow still in it leads Game Wardens to a poacher.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Dog
programme.desc: Dove season starts off with a bang, keeping wardens across the state busy from sunrise to sundown. Texas Game Wardens must relocate a 500-lb gator that's loose in a suburban area. Wardens uncover a large marijuana grow-op hidden in a wildlife preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Life of the Party
programme.desc: A group of anglers are caught bending the rules, and turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island. Later, holiday weekend is in full swing and partygoers are caught tangled in a fistfight, while Warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware
programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Life of the Party
programme.desc: A group of anglers are caught bending the rules, and turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island. Later, holiday weekend is in full swing and partygoers are caught tangled in a fistfight, while Warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware
programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Release the Hounds
programme.desc: Everything in the Pacific Northwest is bigger, including the K-9 units who need to be able to match forces with the resident bears when they need to be driven away from populated areas for their own safety.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Outgunned
programme.desc: The Washington Fish & Game Police deal with more armed suspects than the average beat cop. When one officer encounters a group of hunters who may be breaking the law they quickly find themselves outnumbered.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluff and Feathers
programme.desc: A Pomeranian pup struggles to make friends until he meets some baby chicks his own size.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Jekyll and Hyde Cat
programme.desc: Jackson works with a couple with a blind cat who's suffering from living in a chaotic environment. He then visits a Jekyl and Hyde cat, Jude, that's a darling during the day, but a nightmare at night.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crocodile Love Story
programme.desc: It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. All goes to plan until his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the bonded pair in their new enclosure. The rescue unit fights to save a flying fox entangled in barbed wire.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Rhino Due Date
programme.desc: Eastern black rhino Kitani is due to give birth, and help swell the ranks of this endangered species. However, with Kitani having lost three previous calves, it's a worrying time. Keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Towering Treetop Teahouse
programme.desc: A family needs Pete's help to create a traditional Japanese teahouse treehouse to complete a zen-like paradise in their backyard. Pete and his crew adopt Buddha's teachings in order to build this inspiring project 20 ft. high in a massive cedar tree.

programme.title: Tanked!: Playing Favourites

programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: A couple buys a small home in Sylmar, CA, in hopes of finishing quickly and turning a modest profit. On top of a cracked foundation and failing retaining wall, he's willing to take risks that she is not, so Tarek steps in to get them through the project.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Architectural Opportunities
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Eric and Lindsey flip one of the city's Alexander homes that has lost most of its original charm. Meanwhile in Anaheim, Tarek and Christina get the chance to revive a house designed by influential midcentury architect Cliff May.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Ratty Flips

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: Deadly Triangle

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: The Widow Wore Red

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City

programme.desc: Two neighboring frontiersmen get along great until one's dog frightens the other's daughter and grandson. It's soon all out war that will leave one of them shot dead and the other in a white knuckle standoff with police.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Dungeons and Dying
programme.desc: When the battered corpse of a young woman turns up on the outskirts of Fallbrook, California, detectives unravel a secret world where dominance, sadomasochism, and manipulation reign.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Murder 101
programme.desc: When the strangled body of 21-year-old Susan Schumake was found in Carbondale, Illinois, lack of evidence stumped the police for more than two decades, but new technology lead detectives in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: My Friend, the End
programme.desc: When 18 year-old Harmahn Smith goes missing, his parents call on the CMPD to find him. Detectives run down every lead searching for the teenager, ultimately discovering the terrible details of what had begun for Harmahn as an uneventful night out.

programme.title: To Catch a Killer: Running with the Devil
programme.desc: Three years after a young mother goes missing in Florida, a jailhouse confession promises to bring answers. That is, until Special Agent Dennis Haley uncovers a key witness who's hiding a big secret.

programme.title: Disappeared: Spirited Away
programme.desc: Twenty-one year-old Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed one night following a couple of scuffles with neighbors and friends. Investigators pursue various leads, but the young beauty is nowhere to be found, and her family clings to an endless hope.

programme.title: Disappeared: Every Mother's Son
programme.desc: 20-year old Bear Diaz has diabetes, leaving him weak and vulnerable. When he vanishes in the night with his TV, backpack and cash, investigators must consider foul play. Then Skylar Tosic disappears, leaving people wondering if the cases are linked.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Murder in the Park
programme.desc: 19 year-old single mother, Cheyenne Clough is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die. As police unlock the secrets of her life, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal may have led to her murder.

programme.title: Blood Runs Cold: The Secret
programme.desc: The 1999 murder of a 17-year-old sends shockwaves across a rural Kentucky community. When the police investigation stalls, her family vows to solve it themselves. But in their long hunt for justice, they discover that evil is sickeningly close to home.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: In Colorado, a 911 dispatcher receives a call from a woman in distress. Seven-months pregnant, another woman has slashed her throat. As the dispatcher uncovers the horrific event linking these women, she forges a fast friendship with the victim.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Green Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: As children, Darlene and Charlene Shuler lived modest lives in South Carolina. But as adults, they lived very lavishly. Insatiable greed and deceit between the sisters ran rampant. Eventually, their bond would be shattered by a single gunshot.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Deadly Role Play
programme.desc: Anita Smithey appears trapped in an abusive marriage, until Robert Cline comes along. After a fresh start with his family, Anita seems to feel safe. But she soon reveals a dark side to her new step kids. And the prey becomes the ultimate predator.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis

programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A dangerous escaped convict poses as a man having car trouble in order to invade the home of a former District Attorney, who is there alone with her two small children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.desc: Justin and Griff Griffitts watch the silver kings migration.

programme.desc: After being pushed off their land, the unique Brown family of nine travels deep in the Alaskan bush to build a small shack where they will sleep. The Browns have lived their whole lives in the wild and often go six months without seeing an outsider.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Return to the Wild
programme.desc: The Brown family is determined to make it to their new piece of land in the wild, which is populated by bears and covered in 150-foot widow makers. After barely avoiding disaster on the seas, the Browns reach out to an old friend for help.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Welcome to Browntown
programme.desc: The Browns set up their unique home site comprised of a small log shack for the boys and an outhouse and shower for the girls. The boys' skills appear rusty and they have to prove to Billy that they still have what it takes to make it in the bush.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rocky Seas
programme.desc: Billy and three of his sons face the long journey home on the old boat they just purchased. Meanwhile, Matt and Noah work on an improvement that could electrify Browntown.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Ballad of Billy Brown
programme.desc: The family sets up a series of surprises and celebration for Billy's birthday.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Growing the Wolfpack
programme.desc: The family of nine takes advantage of an early spring to make progress on unfinished business. However, a visitor from Billy's distant past brings potential to undermine the future of Browntown and what means to be a member of the wolf pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back to the Bush
programme.desc: The Wolfpack arrives on their new property in the most remote frontier of the lower 48, but the long winter in the region wreaks havoc on their first attempts to tame the mountain.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: 24 Hours With Theresa
programme.desc: For an entire day, Theresa doesn't shut off spirit, which leads to 24 hours of non-stop readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Keeping the Faith
programme.desc: Theresa conducts a group reading for people of different faiths to show how everyone is connected by Spirit. A pastor, a rabbi, a practicing Buddhist and members of the Hindu faith receive meaningful readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Clearing the List
programme.desc: Reaching out to fans who've been on her mailing list for a decade, Theresa does a series of big group readings to clear her list. A man grieves as he wasn't able to save his dad, and two moms are reconnected to their children who took their own lives.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Five Star Readings
programme.desc: Theresa gives readings to Debbie Gibson, John Schneider from 'Dukes of Hazzard,' Anne Burrell, Dorit Kemsley from 'Real Housewives of Beverly Hills' and Jonathan Lipnicki of 'Jerry Maguire.'

programme.desc: Melissa's Jersey Shore nuptials come with boardwalk entertainers, while Renee creates drama with a Phantom of the Opera themed reception. Amanda expresses her love with a heavenly theme, and Susan shows her marital commitment by washing her fiancés feet.

programme.desc: Former beauty queen Felicia impresses with a pageant gown, while Angie entertains with a Costa Rican courtship dance.

programme.desc: Mandy's alcohol theme keeps her reception guests happy, while Lindsey finds a leprechaun and spares no expense to impress her crowd.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: All Bets are Off

programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Movie: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: Following his master's death, a squire enters a jousting competition in medieval England.

programme.title: Movie: A Knight's Tale

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Crazy in Love

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Anti-protest Protest
programme.desc: The always funny Chaunte Wayans is back to reminisce about an old love, and Dave Helem has a run-in with the anti-gluten brigade. Plus, Pretty Ricki's daughter is spilling tea on the entire congregation.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 10
programme.desc: Counting down the 20 most moronic motor heads ever caught on tape. You'll see a car cut in half, a bumper-loving pig, and a snow plow driver who makes vehicles disappear.

programme.desc: The 20 most hysterical motorheads on the road, in the sky, and on water. See an out-of-control mail truck, a wild road rager, and a man treating a motorbike like it's his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Tex Mex

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Anniversary
programme.desc: It's Ree Drummond and her husband Ladd's anniversary, so to celebrate she's cooking a meal for the whole family. She prepares an Elway's wedge salad, prime rib for five and squaw bread with honey butter.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Competing Breakfasts
programme.desc: Ree's making Ladd's favorite slap-up platter, the Farmer's Breakfast, with over easy fried eggs, a slab of honey-glazed ham, fried sausage and bacon.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Couple That Cooks Together
programme.desc: Ree and Ladd whip up quick and easy jumbo fried shrimp with a simple cocktail sauce, then golden, spicy curly fries.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing a trio of dinners for two: for her daughter, Paige, for the freezer and for her other half, Ladd. Ree's mother-daughter dinner is an all-in-one Spatchcock chicken sheet pan supper.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 10 Things I Love About Ladd
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is spilling the beans on 10 things she loves about her husband, Ladd, and the food he loves most. There's spatchcock BBQ chicken with apple brown sugar BBQ sauce, and he can't resist thin and crispy waffle fries with sour cream and onion dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Very Chocolatey
programme.desc: Things are getting very chocolatey in Ree Drummond's kitchen. For the perfect start to the day, she makes white chocolate and berry pancakes, followed by overload cookies with a fabulous chocolate fivesome.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chocolate Appreciation Day
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is saying thanks with chocolate, appreciating people on her very own chocolate appreciation day. She makes Mississippi mud cake and white chocolate macadamia nut cookies to start, followed by her easy chocolate tart.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sweet Ways to Celebrate
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing all the sweet ways to celebrate Valentine's Day and make it feel extra special. After a meal of sake and miso-marinated salmon with coconut rice and broccolini, there's a brownie tart, mint chocolate bonbons and more.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: I Dream of Chocolate
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his chef friends have chocolate on the brain. Rocco DiSpirito does bacon and chocolate monkey bread, and Elizabeth Faulkner serves chocolate nog-a-ritas. Jet Tila makes mole chicken wings, and Michael Voltaggio cooks cocoa blackened steak.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Chocolate Lover's Supper
programme.desc: To show that chocolate can be more than just candy bars and desserts, Guy Fieri invites some of his favorite chefs to reveal how versatile cocoa can be. Aarti Sequeira makes whipped goat cheese with cacao nibs, thyme, black pepper and honey on crostini.

programme.title: Kitchen Crash: Bringing the Heat to the Street!

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Young Couple Hopes for a House With Old World Charm
programme.desc: Jeff and Sara Jones are Baylor sweethearts and newlyweds, returning to Waco to find a house where they can settle down and one day raise a family. Their all-in budget is $235,000, and they're hoping to find a house with three bedrooms.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Parents of College Students Find Fixer Close to Campus
programme.desc: Ben and Stacie are looking for a home in Waco to be near their children at college.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Veteran Home Makeover
programme.desc: Cleveland Browns quarterback and former Baylor Heisman winner, Robert Griffin III, reaches out to Chip and Joanna for help renovating the home of a veteran in the Waco community.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Son Surprises His Family With a Major Renovation
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna venture 40 miles outside of Waco to Mexia, Texas, to help empty nesters Kelvin and Culetta Beachum find a home to accommodate their children and grandchildren.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Welcome Home: d+ Sneak Peek

programme.title: Self Made Mansions: Against the Odds
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly helps Derrek Burr, owner of Kwik-Hang, and his wife Chelsea search for the house of their dreams. Derrek turned his late father's no-drill curtain rod bracket into a brand that has sold over $8 million of these brilliant tools so far.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Hero's Reward

programme.desc: David helps his 14th set of Massachusetts winners find a home on Boston's South Shore. They've been living in a tiny apartment with their giant fur baby, but they hope to find a property with a huge yard where they can start a family.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Madison Seminary
programme.desc: Dark forces conspire against the team as they investigate the Madison Seminary, one of the most-haunted locations in Ohio. Terrifying voices, shadow figures and physical contact with a demonic entity leaves them stunned and shaken to the core.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Statler Hotel
programme.desc: Dakota's team is pushed to their limits when they check into a historic hotel in Buffalo, NY. Disembodied voices and shadows are everywhere, but the haunted elevators prove most terrifying when communications fail and they each find themselves alone.

programme.title: Destination Fear: West Virginia State Penitentiary
programme.desc: The team heads to Moundsville, West Virginia, to investigate what was once one of the top ten most-violent prisons in America. Dakota fears he may have to leave some part of his soul behind after he is targeted in a horrific physical attack.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Fairfield County Infirmary
programme.desc: The team's terrifying road trip takes them to a house of horrors in Lancaster, Ohio. When Dakota tasks each member to explore the property all alone, Alex encounters something so evil it wouldn't be believed if not caught on video.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Pennhurst State School
programme.desc: The team faces their biggest paranormal challenge yet when they roll up to an abandoned asylum in Spring City, Pennsylvania. The hissing, violent entities within leave them wondering if they'll ever return home from their terrifying road trip.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The team returns to a location that, per to Dakota, affected them more than any other. But it's about redemption as they continue their quest to lean into the fear rather than be overcome by it.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Cambria County Jail
programme.desc: Dakota believes that Alex became violently ill on their last fright night due to total isolation and disorientation. She decides to put this theory to the test by bringing the team to the Cambria County Jail, the site of a dungeon used to torture inmates.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Sheboygan County Asylum
programme.desc: In the final episode of this cursed road trip, Dakota truly delivers on his promise of saving the 'worst' for last. In a blockbuster exclusive, the team visits an asylum that has never allowed overnight exploration until now.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Alien Snake
programme.desc: Cameras capture a snake-like aircraft in the night sky above the Californian Mojave Desert that twists and pulsates as if powered by an alien intelligence; experts are baffled and speculate that it may be evidence of a top-secret military experiment.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bent on Betrayal
programme.desc: Joan Bent is an 80's working girl. She manages a cleaning staff at a local hotel, and has a loving husband at home. But it can be tough having it all - especially when that includes an enemy with murderous intent in your inner circle.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Cathy Stroup is a no-nonsense Irish mom who knows what her family needs to survive. But the question is- how will she survive them?

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Betrayed: Welcome to the Murderhood
programme.desc: 40-year-old Priscilla Strole is looking for a fresh start when she and her teenage son Kyle move to the small town of Fairfield, California. Little does she know, new beginnings lead to her untimely end.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Vows, Lies, and Whispers
programme.desc: Free-spirited Hope follows her heart to Oklahoma to marry Jerry Meek but it's not long before kids come along and the honeymoon is over. On the night of February 21, 2002, a series of mysterious events shatter the family and remain unresolved for years.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Control, Kill, Delete
programme.desc: Matt and Niqué Leili's love story is a modern romance. They meet online, create a blended family, and appear to have it all. But on July 8, 2011, the illusion of a happy marriage is torn apart forever.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Fabio?
programme.desc: Fabio Sementilli was a beloved hairstylist and beauty executive who was murdered while relaxing near his pool. Michelle Miller investigates his murder and the hunt for his killers.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Three Pops and a Pause
programme.desc: Ashlee and Emmett Corrigan seem to have it all; true love, five beautiful children, and a growing business. But in March 2011, an explosive encounter blows their lives apart in an instant, revealing their marriage is not what it seemed.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: The Face of Death

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Love Intrusion

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker

programme.title: Deadly Women: Double Trouble

programme.title: Deadly Women: For the Money Honey
programme.desc: For these women, one good man wasn't enough. A middle-aged woman used looks to prey on elderly gentleman; an army wife didn't want a soldier but a squad; and a serial wife cooks up meals to die for. These Deadly Women married for the money, honey.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sugar and Spite

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor

programme.desc: Experts address homeowner problems while completing renovations on a house project.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike throws Michael a curveball that has major consequences for their business partnership. The rebuild of the River House continues as they battle muck, rain and snow, and after many stressful months, the property is ready to be revealed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.
